violations.text: The dry ingredient scoop is stored on an unclean surface between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Scoop was moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The gasket for the 2 door glass reach-in was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The hand-washing sink in the back prep area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

Time was being used as a control for TCS pastries - no time log was being kept. TCS pastries were voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is now going to keep some display only items out, and pull from back low boy items to be heated and served. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

Various food items were observed being oxygen packaged with out a variance (Fish, soup, roasted pork, cooked meatballs) all items were voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is to immediately stop the process of reduced oxygen packaging. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

Reduced oxygen packaged fish was observed thawing in the refrigerator at 41 D F, Reduced oxygen packaged fish product must be thawed with oxygen re introduced into the package. Fish product was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
Refrigerator door gasket on the two door stand up were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023
The prep sink in the prep area is lacking an air gap. An air gap must be present to prevent the back flow of liquids and gasses into food preparation sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back reveiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023
